summary: Democratic primary held June 24, 2025; Zohran Mamdani had large first-choice support. General election November 4, 2025. Eric Adams running as Independent.
content:
From Wikipedia search results:
- Democratic primary date: June 24, 2025 with ranked-choice voting
- Early voting: June 14, 2025
- Zohran Mamdani (State Assemblyman) showed large first-choice support
- Eric Adams (incumbent) did NOT run in the primary, instead competing as an independent
- Curtis Sliwa (Republican activist) also running
- General election: November 4, 2025
- Current date: September 15, 2025 (about 6-7 weeks before general election)
